title: LRC Events
content: LRC Events Our Library vision is to provide comprehensive information resources and services to support research, teaching, learning activities of the University. We regularly conduct induction/orientation programs on search information, usage of database, Digital Library (Institutional Repository), JUIT Publications Database, avoiding plagiarism, using plagiarism detection tools etc. User Awarness/ Orientation Program User Orientation Program (2023) Springer Special Session 2023 User Orientation Program (2022) User Orientation Program (2021) User Orientation Program (2019) ACM User Awareness Program 2019 User Orientation Program (2018) Faculty Orientation 2018 IEEE User Awareness Program 11 Aug 2018 NDL Portal Registration NDLI Club Registration Book Exhibition Annual Book Exhibition (2019) Annual Book Exhibition (2018) Annual Book Exhibition (2018) Annual Book Exhibition (2016) Bapu Samaran Nidhi 150th Birth Anniversary of Mahatma Gandhi JI (2019) Library Professionals visit Library Professionals visit to LRC International Conference ETTLIS 2010 International Conference
